rules.rule_text:
rule EXE_cloaked_as_TXT
{
	meta:
		description = "Executable with TXT extension"
		author = "Florian Roth"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filename matches /\.txt$/is
}

rule_metadata.name: EXE_extension_cloaking
rule_metadata.description: Executable showing different extension (Windows default 'hide known extension')
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule EXE_extension_cloaking
{
	meta:
		description = "Executable showing different extension (Windows default 'hide known extension')"
		author = "Florian Roth"

	condition:
		filename matches /\.txt\.exe$/is or filename matches /\.pdf\.exe$/is
}

rule_metadata.name: Cloaked_RAR_File
rule_metadata.description: RAR file cloaked by a different extension
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule Cloaked_RAR_File
{
	meta:
		description = "RAR file cloaked by a different extension"
		author = "Florian Roth"

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x52617221 and not filename matches /(rarnew.dat|\.rar)$/is and not filepath contains "Recycle"
}

rule_metadata.name: Base64_encoded_Executable
rule_metadata.description: Detects an base64 encoded executable (often embedded)
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule Base64_encoded_Executable
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects an base64 encoded executable (often embedded)"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		date = "2015-05-28"
		score = 40

	strings:
		$s1 = "TVpTAQEAAAAEAAAA//8AALgAAAA"
		$s2 = "TVoAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA"
		$s3 = "TVqAAAEAAAAEABAAAAAAAAAAAAA"
		$s4 = "TVpQAAIAAAAEAA8A//8AALgAAAA"
		$s5 = "TVqQAAMAAAAEAAAA//8AALgAAAA"

	condition:
		1 of them and not filepath contains "Thunderbird"
}

rule_metadata.name: Binary_Drop_Certutil
rule_metadata.description: Drop binary as base64 encoded cert trick
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule Binary_Drop_Certutil
{
	meta:
		description = "Drop binary as base64 encoded cert trick"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://goo.gl/9DNn8q"
		date = "2015-07-15"
		score = 70

	strings:
		$s0 = "echo -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- >" ascii
		$s1 = "echo -----END CERTIFICATE----- >>" ascii
		$s2 = "certutil -decode " ascii

	condition:
		filesize < 10KB and all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: StegoKatz
rule_metadata.description: Encoded Mimikatz in other file types
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:

		$s2 = "Rpd3ovN3FlalVtNklLQ0xNNGtOV1BiY0VOVHROT0Zud25CWGN0WS9BcEdMR28rK01OWm85Nm9xMlNnY1U5aTgrSTBvNkFob1FOTzRHQWdtUElEVmlqald0Tk90b2FmN01ESWJUQkF5T0pYbTB4bFVHRTBZWEFWOXVoNHBkQnRrS0VFWWVBSEE2TDFzU0c5a2ZFTEc3QWd4WTBYY1l3ZzB6QUFXS09JZE9wQVhEK3lnS3lsR3B5Q1ljR1NJdFNseGZKWUlVVkNFdEZPVjRJUldERUl1QXpKZ2pCQWdsd0Va" ascii

	condition:
		filesize < 1000KB and 1 of them
}
